---
name: Bug report
description: Report a gameplay, UI, mobile, audio, or deployment issue
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: [bug, triage]
assignees: []
---

## Severity

Choose one:

- [ ] S0 Blocker — game cannot load, input breaks, or core flow is impossible
- [ ] S1 Major — player cannot understand or complete a main flow without help
- [ ] S2 Medium — annoying bug, unclear UI, balance frustration, or mobile issue
- [ ] S3 Minor — wording, small visual inconsistency, polish request

## Environment

- Device:
- Browser:
- Input method: mouse / touch / trackpad / keyboard
- Screen size or orientation:
- Game mode: Campaign / Endless / Daily / Challenge Seed
- Level or wave:

## What happened?

Describe the issue clearly.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Extra notes
